pr.title: Non-record: 11L NativeFlowMatcher + Legal TTT — val_bpb 1.1199 (single seed)

output.summary: NativeFlowMatcher’s OT-CFM velocity net learns gated hidden-state corrections within an 11L transformer while combining sliding-window eval with legal score-first TTT.
techniques: Gated OT-CFM velocity net trained alongside AR loss
Legal score-first test-time training on sliding-window eval
Mixed int6/int5 quantization with zstd compression for 16MB artifact
